channel.title: Crumb Structure
channel.description: Fresh takes for home sourdough bakers.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of hydration
item.description: The most common early stumbles in hydration, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home sourdough bakers.

item.title: "sourdough starter troubleshooting" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about sourdough starter troubleshooting through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your whole grain questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the whole grain questions home sourdough bakers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in scoring with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest scoring adjustments that home sourdough bakers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: sourdough starter troubleshooting
item.description: The persistent myths around sourdough starter troubleshooting, stress-tested against what home sourdough bakers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your starters in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying starters project for home sourdough bakers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Breadit is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the whole grain community this week.

item.title: The scoring checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified scoring purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of hydration
item.description: The most common early stumbles in hydration, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home sourdough bakers.
